subcodes.title: Ziyarat for the first [to believe]
subcodes.first_line: Upon thee be the peace of God, then the peace of all who believed in Him, before and after, O thou dawning Sun [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: بسم الله الامنع الاقدس. و إن علیک سلام الله ثم سلام کل من آمن به من قبل و من بعد علیک یا أیتها الشمس المشرقة
subcodes.subjects: @power of the Manifestation of God, @station of the Manifestation of God, @suffering and imprisonment, @Manifestation of God as mirror, @purity of heart; sincerity of intention; sanctity
